description: Style Note This kurti by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Product Details White, green and brown printed kurti that has a round slit neckline, three quarter sleeves with a brown border on the cuff, buttoned chest placket with sequins along the placket and split side seams Material and care Blended fabric Dry clean only Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
